mapper.insert: INSERT INTO note (user_id, mb_id, content, star, img, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{mbId}, #{content}, #{star}, #{img}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.mb_id, n.content, n.star, n.img, n.create_time, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM note n LEFT JOIN user u ON n.user_id = u.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.mb_id, n.content, n.star, n.img, n.create_time, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM note n LEFT JOIN user u ON n.user_id = u.id WHERE n.mb_id = #{mbId} ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE note SET user_id = #{userId}, mb_id = #{mbId}, content = #{content}, star = #{star}, img = #{img} WHERE id = #{id}
